page.content: The table presents hazard ratios (HR) with their corresponding 95% confidence intervals (CI) and p-values (P) across three categories: CC, LRC, and CSS. For High grade tumor, the HR is 0.92 with a 95% CI of 0.17-3.97 and P value of 0.91 in CC; in LRC, HR is 0.78 with a 95% CI of 0.24-2.14 and P value of 0.64; in CSS, HR is 0.40 with a 95% CI of 0.14-0.96 and P value of 0.04. The recurrence ≤6 months after initial therapy shows HR of 0.24 (95% CI: 0.03-4.88, P: 0.28) in CC, 0.32 (95% CI: 0.08-2.15, P: 0.21) in LRC, and 0.10 (95% CI: 0.03-0.40, P: 0.002) in CSS. Previous RT has HRs of 2.21 (95% CI: 0.57-9.00, P: 0.25), 1.26 (95% CI: 0.43-3.51, P: 0.66), and 1.40 (95% CI: 0.60-3.20, P: 0.43) respectively. For Pelvic exenteration, HRs are 4.18 (P: 0.02), 3.01 (P: 0.02), and 1.75 (P: 0.15). Surgical margin grade is not applicable. R0 vs.
